properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You paint the night, You count the stars And You call them by name The skies proclaim, God, You reign

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your glory shines, You teach the sun When to bring a new day Creation sings, God, You reign

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God, You reign, God, You reign Forever and ever, God, You reign

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You part the seas, You move the mountains With the words that You say My song remains, God, You reign

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You hold my life, You know my heart And You call me by name I live to say, God, You reign

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: God, You reign, God, You reign Forever and ever, God, You reign God, You reign, God, You reign I know You reign Forever and ever, God, You reign

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Hallelujah, Hallelu, Hallelujah, Hallelu Hallelujah, Hallelu, Hallelujah, Hallelu
